title: Karlsten Hyper Power Wasp Nest Killer & Hornet Killer 600 ML - Gold Standard High Strength Long Range 5 Metre Spray for Indoor and Outdoor Wasp Nest Removal - Wasp Killer Spray
bullet_points: Powerful 5-Metre Spray Range for Safe, Long-Distance Pest Control – Eliminate wasp nests, hornets, and other pests both indoors and outdoors with Karlsten’s high-performance spray nozzle, reaching up to 5 metres. Stay safe while targeting pests from a distance.

Instant Action for Immediate Wasp & Hornet Nest Elimination – Karlsten’s fast-acting formula kills wasps, hornets, and their nests on contact, providing immediate, visible results. Eliminate pests quickly and efficiently, indoors or outdoors.

Precision Control with Easy-to-Use Aerosol Spray – Designed for maximum convenience, Karlsten’s aerosol can offers precise control, allowing you to spray 3-4 seconds at the nest entrance (for a 30cm nest) from up to 5 meters away or 1-2 second bursts for direct action.

Trusted, Powerful Protection for Home & Garden – Karlsten’s trusted pest control formula is ideal for both indoor and outdoor spaces, keeping your home, garden, and property safe from wasps, hornets, and other harmful pests.

High-Powered Spray for Quick and Effective Nest Elimination – Unlike foam-based products, Karlsten’s hyper-power spray delivers rapid results, effectively eliminating nests without any mess, whether used indoor or outdoor.

Hyper-Power Spray – Not a Foam – Unlike traditional foam-based products, Karlsten’s high-intensity power spray is a liquid spray designed to quickly eliminate nests without the mess or residue, providing fast and efficient pest control.
